task_description: Fix multiple game bugs: Kami turn log markers, season log persistence, Oni of Blood force, Yurei reserve display, betray undo, coin distribution province color, Fire Dragon pre-battle effect, battle bidding coin duplication, monster hostage-taking, and Oni of Skulls size.

verification.summary: All 10 features implemented. npm run build passes with exit code 0. No test framework exists - verification is via successful TypeScript compilation.
